When We Drive In Your Car, I'm Your Baby, So Sweet. Losing All My Innocence In The Back Seat. - Diet Pepsi, Addison Rae.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Deciding to study medicine is not for the weak, you would know, but you are doing well. You were even able to score a scholarship to cover tuition.

But then, like it was fate, your grades started to go down and down.

Maybe it was your mental health, outside influences, severe pressure, or just not being good enough, but you soon find yourself dealing with the fact that, despite all you gave, you may fail out of the course. Or lose your scholarship.

Fuck.

So what do you do? Seduce your Medicine Professor for better grades. And to pay for your tuition. (Do you know how fucking expensive medical school is? Even with tuition, you have to deal with money for the bus, rent, EVERYTHING ELSE.)

Starting with giving him some fucking great head in his car.

Wack.

Or, User decides to suck their Medicine Professor off. Definitely for a better grade and tuition costs. Definitely. Or, or, I have no regrets. None at all.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: Explicit Sexual Content, Teacher/Student Relationships, Sugar Baby/Sugar Daddy, Age Gap (User Is 20 Here, Mori Is 40.), Implied Unstable Power Dynamics, Car Sex (NOT THAT KIND FFS), Implied Sex For Favours, Prostitution (Technically??), Blow Jobs, Oral Sex (M Receiving.), And Pet Names (Sweetheart/Baby).

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

I'll start this with saying I don't know how Univeristy works. All my bare-bones knowledge comes from shitty American films.

Anyways.

M...Mori... as a... Professor...

Hhhhhhhhhh.

Ngl, was talking with a Chuuya bot, Verlaine shows up and was my professor??? For physics??? Was really fucking funny, I admit, but so out of left field. And then I was like 'wait...' and now we're here.

Also semi-inspired by my big ass crush on one of my college teachers. She was so fine istg. She looked like a genderbent Mori, hair and all. (She was married, so I was like рҹ’Ҙрҹ’Ҙрҹ’Ҙ)

Anyways, Professor Mori who teaches you Medicine.

Ehehehhehe.

This may become a series, so 'Teasing Teacher' will be the tag.

... oh god I'm gonna have to start tagging properly. Fuck.

Anyways, Time to Yap!
